subcodes.first_line: Humanity is created in the image of the Merciful [God], that is to say with Divine attributes
subcodes.first_line_orig: خلق الانسان علی صوره الرحمن ای الصفة الرحمانیه فالشمایل الجسمانیه تفنی
subcodes.subjects: @relationship of the soul to the body, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @human reality created in the image of God, @origin of the soul; the soul as emanation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
